pages.title: Activity Scale
pages.text: $(li)Valid Activity: 1–15.$(br)$(li)Missing or invalid data becomes 5.$(br)$(li)Higher Activity extends serum duration.$(br)$(li)Higher Activity can raise the initial effect level.$(br)$(li)Repeated doses stack until their configured caps.

pages.title: Three Enhancements
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)S-01$(): attack speed, Strength, and knockback resistance.$(br)$(li)$(bold)S-02$(): night vision and private target outlines.$(br)$(li)$(bold)S-03$(): food-powered healing, movement, and jumping.$(br2)All three serums can coexist and stack independently up to level VIII. S-03 needs food level 7 or higher to heal.
